case_title: JOHN A MIKITA VS. 399 FREMONT, LLC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2020 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-09-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JOHN A MIKITA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT 399 FREMONT, LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY KAYLA ALTENLOH, COMMUNITY DIRECTOR. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE OR THE AGREEMENT IS BROKEN. IF NO APPEARANCE, THIS CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
